prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: cinematic scene backdrop
Primary request: widescreen environment art for a Mars wasteland in the Ares setting
Scene/background: open Martian surface under a dark cold sky, endless rust-red dust plain, distant broken industrial towers and relay silhouettes, faint storm haze at the horizon
Style/medium: cinematic sci-fi environment art matching the existing Ares assets folder examples, detailed hard-surface architecture, grounded realism, no characters
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, strong horizon line, readable foreground terrain, distant structures for scale
Lighting/mood: dim hostile twilight, industrial warning lights, bleak and windswept
Color palette: iron red, ash black, cold gray, sparse amber signal lights
Constraints: no text; no labels; no watermark; no fantasy elements; no heroic posing; no close-up characters; should feel distinct from dense urban district art
